services_supported: kitchen hood suppression system installation and service
emergency_definition: Authority Having Jurisdiction violation notice received
emergency_routing_rules: if no answer or AHJ violation notice, escalate to on-call supervisor Rick Navarro at 602-555-0166
if still no answer, log the call and promise callback in under 30 minutes
non_emergency_routing_rules: collect name, number, company name, and nature of the call
read back to them that someone will contact them next business day
call_transfer_rules: during business hours, transfer to main line 623-555-0100
if main line is not answered, go to voicemail
integration_constraints: do not comment on system status
forward permit status inquiries to Pam
agent must never say 'guaranteed' or 'guarantee' in any form
after_hours_flow_summary: collect caller information and promise callback next business day for non-emergencies, route emergencies to dispatch line
office_hours_flow_summary: answer calls, transfer to main line if necessary, and take messages if no one is available
questions_or_unknowns: no detailed information on how to handle multiple simultaneous emergency calls
no information on holiday hours or special exception handling
notes: use specific greeting: 'Thank you for calling FireGuard Protection Services, your commercial fire protection specialists. For fire or sprinkler emergencies, please stay on the line. For all other inquiries, how may I direct your call?'
